body:
## Purpose 
Closes #199, and improved error messaging.

## Content
- Adds information such as "Expected `X`, got `Y` " where applicable into the error messages
- Changes `error(` and `ErrorException` to better errors where required.
- Improves codecov for error messages 
- Also, adds a one-character bugfix ([`\!!! info` -> `!!! info`](https://clima.github.io/EnsembleKalmanProcesses.jl/dev/ensemble_kalman_inversion/#Handling-forward-model-failures)) in a docs page, updated version [here](https://clima.github.io/EnsembleKalmanProcesses.jl/previews/PR209/ensemble_kalman_inversion/#Handling-forward-model-failures) (not worth a separate PR)
title: Improved error messaging
